cards.name: Ⅶ The Chariot
cards.interpretation: success, ambition, determination, willpower, control, self-discipline, focus

cards.name: 4 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: possessiveness, insecurity, hoarding, stinginess, stability, security, savings, materialism, wealth, frugality, boundaries, guardedness

cards.name: 3 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of cohesion, lack of teamwork, apathy, poor motivation, conflict, ego, competition
